top_signals.title: Gulf tensions escalate as Iran hits Kuwait, US strikes near Hormuz
top_signals.summary: CENTCOM said it had carried out a new round of defensive strikes in southern Iran, while an Iranian drone attack on the Kuwait airport killed one person.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CrowdStrike narrowly beats estimates on AI tailwinds, but stock falls 10%
top_signals.summary: CrowdStrike shares have rallied nearly 60% this year on skyrocketing demand for cybersecurity in the age of advanced artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

Less-than-truckload carrier XPO seems set to exceed its second-quarter tonnage projection based on the company's May update.
